content:
📜 1. Structuring the Documentation for Maximum Usability

Instead of dumping everything in a single massive document, we will break it down into multiple interlocking documents and sections.

✔ Three Core Documents for Organization
1. Public Game State Document (Visible to Students)
• This is the master save state that includes everything students can see:
• Macro course structure (weeks, themes, assignments, challenges).
• RPG elements (archetypes, roles, items, rules, XP tracking).
• Weekly item and power-up logs.
• In-class mechanics overview.
• Decision tracking.
• Game history logs.
2. Instructor’s Game Master Document (For You Only)
• This is the hidden game master control sheet that includes:
• All secret rolls and decision points.
• The observer’s passive effect tracker.
• The evolving XP leaderboard.
• Secret interactions, hidden effects, and professor role adjustments.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 412 (chunk 412/555)
